organizer.title: Event safety
organizer.description: Set versioned participation requirements and keep a controlled, auditable record of safety decisions.
organizer.load_error_description: The safety policy and review ledger could not be loaded. No safety decision has been changed.
organizer.configuration_invalid: Safety enforcement is unavailable because its configuration is invalid.
organizer.shadow_description: Requirements are evaluated and recorded, but they do not yet block participation.
organizer.read_only: You can view this policy but cannot change its requirements.
organizer.action_error: The safety change could not be saved. Refresh the workspace and try again.

success.saved: Safety requirements saved as a draft.

attendee.title: Participation requirements
attendee.description: Complete the applicable safety steps before registering or joining the waitlist.
attendee.load_error_description: We could not verify the event's safety requirements. Try again before registering.
attendee.action_error: That safety step could not be completed. Try again.

requirements.title: Participation policy
requirements.description: Draft changes are private until published. Publishing creates an immutable version for evidence matching.
requirements.minimum_age_hint: Leave blank when the event has no minimum age.
requirements.guardian_required_hint: Consent is bound to the exact published requirement version and event date.
requirements.minor_threshold_hint: Members below this age at the event need consent.
requirements.code_required_hint: Attendees must acknowledge the exact published text before participating.
requirements.code_version_hint: Use a meaningful identifier, such as event-conduct-2026-01.
requirements.code_text_hint: State the complete terms attendees must read and acknowledge.
requirements.archive_description: Archived requirements stop being the active participation policy. The evidence and audit history remain retained.

reasons.unknown: A participation requirement still needs attention.
reasons.event_safety_unbound_guest_denied: Sign in to verify the participation requirements.
reasons.event_safety_user_not_active: Your member account is not currently active.
reasons.event_safety_bilateral_user_block: A member block prevents participation in this event.
reasons.event_safety_requirements_not_published: The organizer has not published the safety requirements yet.
reasons.event_safety_requirements_integrity_inva: The published safety requirements could not be verified.
reasons.event_safety_requirements_version_unavai: The published requirement version is unavailable.
reasons.event_safety_date_of_birth_required: Add your date of birth so age requirements can be checked.
reasons.event_safety_date_of_birth_invalid: Your recorded date of birth could not be verified.
reasons.event_safety_minimum_age_not_met: You do not meet this event's minimum age.
reasons.event_safety_minor_policy_unavailable: The policy for minor participation is unavailable.
reasons.event_safety_code_of_conduct_acknowledge: Acknowledge the current code of conduct.
reasons.event_safety_active_participation_denial: An active safety decision prevents participation.
reasons.event_safety_safeguarding_policy_denied: The safeguarding policy does not currently permit participation.
reasons.event_safety_safeguarding_policy_invalid: The safeguarding decision could not be verified.
reasons.event_safety_organizer_not_active: The event organizer is not currently active.
reasons.event_safety_denial_safeguarding_policy: A safeguarding policy decision prevents participation.

code.title: Code of conduct
code.confirm_read: I have read and agree to the complete code of conduct.

guardian.title: Guardian consent
guardian.description: The guardian receives a private, time-limited link. Their identity and consent token are never shown in the event roster.
guardian.privacy_notice: The address is encrypted for delivery and removed from the delivery envelope after processing.

reviews.title: Participation reviews
reviews.description: Record controlled decisions without free-text notes, contact details, or incident records.
reviews.member_hint: Search by name, then select the correct member.
reviews.member_search_error: Members could not be searched. Try again.
reviews.effective_until_hint: Leave blank when the decision has no scheduled end.
reviews.no_notes_notice: For privacy, this ledger accepts controlled reason codes only. Record incidents and sensitive evidence in the approved safeguarding system.
reviews.action_error: The participation review could not be changed. Refresh and try again.
reviews.empty: No participation reviews have been recorded for this event.

guardian_grant.title: Review guardian consent
guardian_grant.description: Confirm the email address that received this private link, then give consent for the attendee to take part under the event's published safety requirements.
guardian_grant.email_hint: Enter the same address that received the consent request.
guardian_grant.confirm_label: I am the named parent, guardian or carer and I consent to this attendee taking part.
guardian_grant.privacy_notice: The link is time limited and can be used only for this event and requirement version. The response does not reveal whether an email address is registered.
guardian_grant.success_description: The attendee can now continue once any other event requirements are complete.
guardian_grant.invalid_title: This consent link cannot be used
guardian_grant.invalid_description: The link or email address may be incorrect, expired or already completed. Ask the attendee to send a new request.

govuk.title: Event safety
govuk.intro: Review the participation requirements, complete any steps that apply to you, or manage the event's controlled safety policy.
govuk.updated: The event safety record has been updated.
govuk.failed: The safety change could not be completed. Review the current information and try again.
govuk.unavailable_body: The participation requirements could not be verified. No safety decision has been changed.
govuk.policy_intro: Draft changes remain private until published. Each published version is retained for evidence matching.
govuk.minimum_age_hint: Leave blank when the event has no minimum age.
govuk.minor_threshold_hint: Members below this age at the event need guardian consent.
govuk.code_required: Require attendees to acknowledge the code of conduct
govuk.code_version_hint: Use a meaningful identifier, such as event-conduct-2026-01.
govuk.archive_warning: Archived requirements stop being the active policy. Evidence and audit history remain retained.

eligibility.deny: Participation is currently blocked until the listed requirements are resolved.
eligibility.unavailable: The requirements cannot currently be verified. Try again before registering.
eligibility.not_evaluated: The participation requirements have not yet been evaluated.

govuk.confirm_code: I have read and agree to the complete code of conduct.

guardian_status.required: A guardian consent request is required.
guardian_status.pending: The request is awaiting the guardian's response.
guardian_status.withdrawn: The guardian consent request was withdrawn.
guardian_status.expired: The guardian consent request has expired.

govuk.guardian_privacy: The address is encrypted for delivery and removed from the delivery envelope after processing.
govuk.reviews_intro: Record controlled decisions without free-text notes, contact details or incident records.

reasons.unknown: A participation requirement still needs attention.

govuk.effective_until_hint: Leave blank when the decision has no scheduled end.
govuk.no_notes: For privacy, use controlled reasons only. Keep incidents and sensitive evidence in the approved safeguarding system.
govuk.no_people: No event participants are available for a new review.
govuk.ledger_empty: No participation reviews have been recorded for this event.
